details.message: reports/board/ directory was missing. Created during governance run. All other expected top-level dirs present: src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/, reports/audit/.

moltbot/ directory exists with 5 active Python modules: sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, board.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py. Additionally, 3 molt-related scripts found in scripts/: run_molt_workflow.py, run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py. scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py references 'clawdbot' in governance check logic. MEMORY_BANK.md documents moltbot/ as legitimate learning workflow — may require governance decision on whether these should remain or be removed.
